CertificationElectronRuntimeDigest.description: Identity of the exact Electron runtime descriptor and bytes.

CertificationExceptionProvenanceDigest.description: Identity of the complete approved exception-provenance set, including the canonical empty set.

CertificationHostAgentDigest.description: Identity of the exact host-agent implementation.

CertificationHostImageDigest.description: Identity of the immutable host operating-system image and build descriptor.

CertificationHostPatchSetDigest.description: Identity of the exact host patch-set descriptor.

CertificationLanguageRuntimeSetDigest.description: Identity of the complete exact language-runtime version and artifact set.

CertificationProbeAssetSetDigest.description: Identity of the complete exact probe-asset set.

CertificationRunnerArchitecture.description: Architecture fixed by certification-runner identity format version 1.

CertificationRunnerEnvironmentIdentity.description: Exact platform and executable environment of a certification runner.

CertificationRunnerImageDigest.description: Identity of the immutable runner image or executable closure.

CertificationRunnerPlatform.description: Platform fixed by certification-runner identity format version 1.

CertificationRunnerProvenanceIdentity.description: Exact source and exception provenance of a certification runner.

CertificationRunnerToolingIdentity.description: Exact tool and probe environment of a certification runner.

CertificationSourceRevisionDigest.description: Identity of the exact certification source revision.

CertificationToolchainSetDigest.description: Identity of the complete exact compiler/toolchain version and artifact set.

CertificationVerifierDigest.description: Identity of the exact evidence verifier implementation.

Sha256Digest.description: A SHA-256 digest serialized as lowercase `sha256:<hex>` text.

description:
Canonical non-authorizing identity of every immutable certification-runner input.

Every aggregate digest names a separately canonical descriptor that includes exact versions and
artifact identities for that role. This document alone does not authenticate a producer, prove
that a run occurred, bind evidence to a run, establish freshness, or assign certification trust.

Generic deserialization is deliberately unavailable so hostile bytes cannot bypass the document
ceiling:

```compile_fail
fn require_deserialize<T: for<'de> serde::Deserialize<'de>>() {}
require_deserialize::<weregopher_domain::CertificationRunnerIdentity>();
```
title: CertificationRunnerIdentity
